personas.name: News Curator
personas.description: Responsible for creating and managing AI-generated, genre-specific news briefings, including assigning avatars, generating narration scripts, creating AI videos, and storing videos with metadata.

personas.name: User
personas.description: Consumes the latest AI-generated news videos from the 7-genre video set linked to active news cycles without triggering new video creations.

flows.sub_goal: Create realistic presynthesized videos for each genre
actions: Retrieve teacher avatar IDs using the API https://mailer.hertzai.com/all_teacher_only_avatars_id_user_id?user_id={user_id}
Assign one avatar to each genre: Politics, Business, Sports, Breaking News, Science, AI, and Weather
For each genre, fetch the latest headlines using Google search query
Generate short narration scripts in news anchor style for each genre with current timestamp
Generate one realistic AI video per script using assigned avatar for that genre; mark conv_id status as pending
Check video generation status every 1 minute using https://mailer.hertzai.com/get-video-conv_id/{{conv_id}} and update status to success as confirmed
Store all 7 videos with metadata: genre, avatar, video URL, generation timestamp, and expiry timestamp (+2 hours)
Schedule this flow to execute every 2 hours, tracking news stories with timestamp arrays and managing metadata context accordingly

flows.flow_name: Deliver the realistic news Videos to User from the successful metadata records in Active 2-Hour Window
flows.sub_goal: Reuse the same 7-genre video set for users within the current 2-hour cycle based on expiry timestamp
actions: Check and get the list of conv_id with status marked as success by comparing current timestamp against new script timestamp
If conv_id list is not empty, fetch the 7 pre-generated videos linked to the conv_id, including assigned avatars
Publish each realistic video sequentially to the user using conv_id; save conv_id list into new key in metadata against played_news_user_id
